title: Refined Schematics
description: A mod that connects Create's Schematicannon to RS network.
body:
# Refined Schematics

Adds the Cannon Interface, allowing you to connect your Refined Storage network with Create's Schematicannon


An official port of [Schematic Energistics](https://modrinth.com/mod/schematic-energistics) to Refined Storage. 


## Features

- Automatically extracts required items from RS storage
- Can autocraft schematic items when needed
- Refill gunpowder automatically
- Available for Neoforge 1.21.1

## Usage

Place the Cannon Interface next to a Schematicannon and connect it to the Refined Storage network. The Schematicannon will detect only one Cannon Interface at a time.

The Schematicannon will always prioritize other containers (chest, barrels, etc) before requesting items from the RS network. 



## Credits

[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

[Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage)
